reference.generatedWith: manual JShell probe from mf2/reference/icu4j classpath

demoFormatter.description: Current dependency-free :currency demo formatter. This fixture documents where it matches ICU4J and where it is knowingly insufficient.
demoFormatter.scope: diagnostic fixture only; not part of pass/fail runtime conformance

cases.label: fr-fr-eur-spacing
cases.knownGap: Currency spacing differs; ICU4J uses a non-breaking space before the currency symbol.

cases.label: de-de-eur-order-and-separators
cases.knownGap: The demo formatter has no German locale pattern, decimal separator, grouping separator, or currency placement.

cases.label: ja-jp-jpy-symbol
cases.knownGap: ICU4J uses the locale-preferred fullwidth yen symbol.

cases.label: ar-eg-usd-numbering-and-bidi
cases.knownGap: The demo formatter has no Arabic numbering-system, separator, currency placement, or bidi behavior.
